LanguageData.RICS.Dialog.ResetXenotypeQuestion: Reset ALL xenotype prices for {0} to gene-based values?
LanguageData.RICS.Dialog.ResetXenotypeWarning: This will overwrite any custom prices you've set.
LanguageData.RICS.Label.SelectRace: Select a race to see details
LanguageData.RICS.Message.SelectRaceToReset: Select a race first to reset prices
LanguageData.RICS.Tooltip.ResetAllPrices: Reset all xenotype prices for selected race to gene-based values
LanguageData.RICS.Button.SetAllXenotypesToBasePrice: Set All Xenotypes to Base Price
LanguageData.RICS.Message.AllXenotypePricesSetToBase: Set {0} xenotype prices to base price {2} for {1}
LanguageData.RICS.Tooltip.SetAllXenotypesToBasePrice: Sets every xenotype price for this race to the race Base Price (one-click uniform pricing)
